TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_cacebalen, title = cacebalen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/cacebalen} }

S.FORM: cacebalen Śāė yadah ku cacebalen i salining. siwkay nu balat u zuma a ngangan sa u "saung", saung sa u kamu nu Hulam. u Pangcah a kamu sa "linay". sapipalidung, sapitena' ku udad suleda' atu cilal..., u ayzaay a cacebalan yadah ku kulit. izaw ku matekesay izaw tu kapahay. maydih micakay ku tatayna tu cacebalan, izay mangaleb ku cilal i Taywan kiyami. tinaku a kamu kasicacebalen Ť¶ĀśĒúŚł∂Śāė la'cus ku demiad kasicacebalen tu! u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika An umbrella or parasol is a folding canopy supported by wooden or metal ribs, which is usually mounted on a wooden, metal, or plastic pole. It is designed to protect a person against rain or sunlight. The word "umbrella" typically refers to a device used for protection from rain. The word parasol usually refers to an item designed to protect from the sun. Often the difference is the material used for the canopy; some parasols are not waterproof. Umbrella canopies may be made of fabric or flexible plastic.
S.PHON: ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn * jadańß ku ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn i sar~…ĺiniŇč. siwkaj nu bar~…ĺat u zuma a ŇčaŇčan sa u "sauŇč", sauŇč sa u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam. u paŇč ¶ańß a kamu sa "r~…ĺinaj". sapipar~…ĺiduŇč, sapit…ôna Ē~ ° ku udad sur~…ĺ…ôda Ē~ ° atu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ..., u ajzaaj a ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺan jadańß ku kur~…ĺit. izaw ku mat…ôk…ôsaj izaw tu kapańßaj. majdińß mi ¶akaj ku tatajna tu ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺan, izaj maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ i tajwan kijami. tinaku a kamu kasi ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn **** r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku d…ômiad kasi ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn tu! u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika an umbr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa or parasor~…ĺ is a for~…ĺdiŇč ¶anopj support…ôd bj wood…ôn or m…ôtar~…ĺ ribs, wńßi ¶ńß is usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj mount…ôd on a wood…ôn, m…ôtar~…ĺ, or pr~…ĺasti ¶ por~…ĺ…ô. it is d…ôsign…ôd to prot…ô ¶t a p…ôrson against rain or sunr~…ĺigńßt. tńß…ô word "umbr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa" tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj r…ôf…ôrs to a d…ô*i ¶…ô us…ôd for prot…ô ¶tion from rain. tńß…ô word parasor~…ĺ usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj r…ôf…ôrs to an it…ôm d…ôsign…ôd to prot…ô ¶t from tńß…ô sun. oft…ôn tńß…ô diff…ôr…ôn ¶…ô is tńß…ô mat…ôriar~…ĺ us…ôd for tńß…ô ¶anopj; som…ô parasor~…ĺs ar…ô not wat…ôrproof. umbr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa ¶anopi…ôs maj b…ô mad…ô of fabri ¶ or fr~…ĺ…ô*ibr~…ĺ…ô pr~…ĺasti ¶.
S.FORM: cacebalen Śāė yadah ku cacebalen i salining. siwkay nu balat u zuma a ngangan sa u "saung", saung sa u kamu nu Hulam. u Pangcah a kamu sa "linay". sapipalidung, sapitena' ku udad suleda' atu cilal..., u ayzaay a cacebalan yadah ku kulit. izaw ku matekesay izaw tu kapahay. maydih micakay ku tatayna tu cacebalan, izay mangaleb ku cilal i Taywan kiyami. tinaku a kamu kasicacebalen Ť¶ĀśĒúŚł∂Śāė la'cus ku demiad kasicacebalen tu! u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika An umbrella or parasol is a folding canopy supported by wooden or metal ribs, which is usually mounted on a wooden, metal, or plastic pole. It is designed to protect a person against rain or sunlight. The word "umbrella" typically refers to a device used for protection from rain. The word parasol usually refers to an item designed to protect from the sun. Often the difference is the material used for the canopy; some parasols are not waterproof. Umbrella canopies may be made of fabric or flexible plastic.
S.PHON: ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn * jadańß ku ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn i sar~…ĺiniŇč. siwkaj nu bar~…ĺat u zuma a ŇčaŇčan sa u "sauŇč", sauŇč sa u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam. u paŇč ¶ańß a kamu sa "r~…ĺinaj". sapipar~…ĺiduŇč, sapit…ôna Ē~ ° ku udad sur~…ĺ…ôda Ē~ ° atu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ..., u ajzaaj a ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺan jadańß ku kur~…ĺit. izaw ku mat…ôk…ôsaj izaw tu kapańßaj. majdińß mi ¶akaj ku tatajna tu ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺan, izaj maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ i tajwan kijami. tinaku a kamu kasi ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn **** r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku d…ômiad kasi ¶a ¶…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn tu! u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika an umbr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa or parasor~…ĺ is a for~…ĺdiŇč ¶anopj support…ôd bj wood…ôn or m…ôtar~…ĺ ribs, wńßi ¶ńß is usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj mount…ôd on a wood…ôn, m…ôtar~…ĺ, or pr~…ĺasti ¶ por~…ĺ…ô. it is d…ôsign…ôd to prot…ô ¶t a p…ôrson against rain or sunr~…ĺigńßt. tńß…ô word "umbr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa" tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj r…ôf…ôrs to a d…ô*i ¶…ô us…ôd for prot…ô ¶tion from rain. tńß…ô word parasor~…ĺ usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj r…ôf…ôrs to an it…ôm d…ôsign…ôd to prot…ô ¶t from tńß…ô sun. oft…ôn tńß…ô diff…ôr…ôn ¶…ô is tńß…ô mat…ôriar~…ĺ us…ôd for tńß…ô ¶anopj; som…ô parasor~…ĺs ar…ô not wat…ôrproof. umbr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa ¶anopi…ôs maj b…ô mad…ô of fabri ¶ or fr~…ĺ…ô*ibr~…ĺ…ô pr~…ĺasti ¶.
